name: Pan-Fried Abalone
recipeInstructions:
1. Tenderize the abalone steaks by pounding with a wooden mallet until they are flattened to a quarter-inch thickness.
2. Do not overcook; 30 seconds per side is sufficient, less is better.
3. Pat the abalone dry and let it cool slightly.
4. Melt the butter and oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add the steaks when the butter foams and the pan is very hot.
6. Season with salt and pepper and fry for 30 seconds on each side.
7. Transfer to a warm platter, drizzle with lemon juice, and garnish with parsley.
